message:
fix(sling): serialize concurrent hook writes with per-assignee flock (gt-ffg)

Re-implement the per-assignee flock that was reverted in 927c935e. The
per-bead sling lock prevents double-sling of the same bead but does not
prevent concurrent slings from racing on the same assignees hook_bead
row in Dolt, causing silent rollbacks under batch dispatch.

Fix: acquire assignee_<agent>.flock in .runtime/locks/sling/ around all
hookBeadWithRetry call sites (sling.go, sling_dispatch.go, sling_formula.go).

Improvements over the reverted version:
- Use FlockTryAcquire with retry+timeout (20 attempts, 500ms interval)
  instead of indefinite blocking FlockAcquire, preventing stuck slings
  from blocking all subsequent slings to the same assignee
- Use defer for lock release, ensuring cleanup on panics
- Cover all three hookBeadWithRetry call sites (original only covered
  sling.go)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
